input.command:
git add nix/module.nix && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Improve nftables example with stricter default-drop policy

Update the commented nftables example to use policy drop instead of
policy accept, and add explicit rules for loopback, established
connections, DNS resolution, and named external API endpoints.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/patflynn/reel-life/pulls/comments/3005308250","pull_request_review_id":4026011964,"id":3005308250,"node_id":"PRRC_kwDORm_vg86zIV1a","diff_hunk":"@@ -1,3 +1,41 @@
+# reel-life NixOS module
+#
+# Systemd hardening overview:
+#   This module runs reel-life as a sandboxed systemd service with DynamicUser,
+#   strict filesystem protection, capability dropping, syscall filtering, and
+#   optional network allowlisting.
+#
+# Testing the sandbox:
+#   systemd-analyze security reel-life
+#   Expected score: ~2.0 (on a 0–10 scale where lower is more secure).
+#
+# Network allowlisting:
+#   The `restrictNetwork` option enables systemd's IPAddressAllow/IPAddressDeny
+#   for localhost (Sonarr) access. Since IPAddressAllow works with IPs, not DNS
+#   names, external APIs (api.anthropic.com, chat.googleapis.com) require either:
+#     1. Adding their IP ranges to `allowedHosts` (IPs change over time), or
+#     2. Using nftables for DNS-aware filtering (recommended for production):
+#
+#   networking.nftables = {
+#     enable = true;
+#     tables.reel-life-egress = {
+#       family = "inet";
+#       content = ''
+#         chain output {
+#           type filter hook output priority 0; policy accept;
+#           meta skuid "reel-life" tcp dport { 80, 443 } ip daddr {
+#             127.0.0.1, # Sonarr
+#           } accept
+#           meta skuid "reel-life" tcp dport { 80, 443 } drop
+#         }","path":"nix/module.nix","commit_id":"b44b2f698a01e699a527afa46126988cc369878a","original_commit_id":"c0a705f083df1b190505cb3b0c375e6615f484a8","user":{"login":"patflynn","id":7862557,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjc4NjI1NTc=","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/7862557?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/patflynn","html_url":"https://github.com/patflynn","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/patflynn/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/patflynn/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/patflynn/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/patflynn/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/patflynn/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/patflynn/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/patflynn/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/patflynn/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/patflynn/received_events","type":"User","user_view_type":"public","site_admin":false},"body":"Addressed
